title: CGS Classifier Labeling Schema
description: Machine-readable labeling schema for training corpus construction. Companion to doc3_classifier_specification.md. Version 1.0.0.

LabelerConfidence.description: Labeler confidence. Low-confidence examples excluded from training; retained for evaluation set.

signal_present.description: True if the signal is present in this turn. False-negative bias: when ambiguous, label false.

evidence_present.description: True if new evidence or new proposition is present in the turn. Required for Signal A and C.

classification_notes.description: Required when signal_present is true. Identify which markers triggered the classification.

ambiguity_description.description: Required when constraint_consistency is ambiguous or conflicting.

tradeoff_type.description: explicit: tradeoff language present in input. implicit: tradeoff inferred from domain/context. none: no tradeoff.

input_text.description: Raw user turn text. No modification.

label.description: Ground truth output. Schema varies by classifier_target — see definitions.

oneOf.description: Use when classifier_target is SPM_A, SPM_B, or SPM_C
Use when classifier_target is ICC_intent or ICC_consistency

labeler_id.description: Anonymized labeler identifier. Do not use real names.

notes.description: Edge case notes or classification rationale. Required when confidence is low or medium.

edge_case_flag.description: True if this example tests a known edge case from the edge case registry (EC-01 through EC-08).

edge_case_id.description: Edge case registry ID if edge_case_flag is true. E.g. EC-04.

second_labeler_id.description: Required before example is admitted to training set. Null until second review complete.

second_labeler_label.description: Second labeler's independent label. Must match schema of primary label field.

cohen_kappa.description: Inter-rater reliability between labeler_id and second_labeler_id. Required >= 0.75 for training admission. Null until both labels present.

training_eligible.description: Set by labeling pipeline. True when: confidence != low AND cohen_kappa >= 0.75 AND second_labeler_id present.

split.description: Dataset split assignment. 80% train, 10% eval, 10% test. Balanced across labels within each split.

CorpusSizeRequirements.description: Minimum labeled examples per classifier before training begins.
